description: Add missing whatsapp_enabled and sms_enabled flags to the admin panel UI, reorganize categories to include a Notifications & Messaging group, and replace the generic ConfigFlagCard with smart config rendering using a CONFIG_HINTS map that provides dropdowns, number inputs with units, time inputs, and checkboxes based on the flag type.
steps: In apps/web/components/admin/feature-flag-settings.tsx, add 'MessageCircle' and 'Phone' to the lucide-react imports (MessageCircle is already imported in settings-management-client.tsx so confirm it works).

Add two new entries to FLAG_META: whatsapp_enabled with label 'WhatsApp Notifications', description 'Send OTPs and order updates via WhatsApp Business API', icon MessageCircle; and sms_enabled with label 'SMS Notifications', description 'Send OTPs and order updates via SMS', icon Phone.

Add a new category to FLAG_CATEGORIES: { title: 'Notifications & Messaging', keys: ['whatsapp_enabled', 'sms_enabled', 'ring_alert_rules', 'print_required_alert'], color: 'indigo' }. Remove ring_alert_rules and print_required_alert from the 'Operations' category.

Create a CONFIG_HINTS constant (Record<string, Record<string, { type: 'select' | 'number' | 'text' | 'time' | 'checkbox'; options?: string[]; suffix?: string; prefix?: string; label?: string }>>) that maps each config flag key to its field definitions: delivery_mode.mode -> select ['both','instant','scheduled']; delivery_radius_km.value -> number suffix 'km'; minimum_order_value.value -> number prefix '₹'; free_delivery_threshold.value -> number prefix '₹'; max_orders_per_hour.value -> number suffix 'orders/hr', max_orders_per_hour.action -> select ['queue','reject']; surge_pricing_enabled.multiplier -> number suffix '×', surge_pricing_enabled.message -> text; delivery_partner_assignment.mode -> select ['nearest','round_robin','manual']; eta_display_mode.mode -> select ['always','after_assignment']; substitute_approval_mode.mode -> select ['always_ask','auto_accept','auto_reject']; store_open_hours.open -> time, store_open_hours.close -> time, store_open_hours.autoToggle -> checkbox; max_items_per_order.value -> number suffix 'items'; order_edit_window_minutes.value -> number suffix 'minutes'; new_user_discount.percent -> number suffix '%', new_user_discount.maxDiscount -> number prefix '₹', new_user_discount.minOrder -> number prefix '₹'; referral_enabled.senderReward -> number prefix '₹', referral_enabled.receiverReward -> number prefix '₹'; maintenance_mode.message -> text, maintenance_mode.eta -> text label 'ETA (optional)'.

Replace the generic ConfigFlagCard component with a SmartConfigFlagCard that checks CONFIG_HINTS[flag.key]. If hints exist, render each config field using the appropriate input type: 'select' renders a <select> dropdown with the options array; 'number' renders an <input type=number> with optional prefix/suffix displayed as decorative text adjacent to the input; 'text' renders <input type=text>; 'time' renders <input type=time>; 'checkbox' renders a toggle/checkbox. If no hints exist for a flag, fall back to the original generic behavior (text/number inputs). Keep the toggle and card chrome identical to the existing design.
Update the main FeatureFlagSettings component to use SmartConfigFlagCard instead of ConfigFlagCard where flag.config exists.
acceptance_criteria: whatsapp_enabled and sms_enabled flags appear in the admin panel under a 'Notifications & Messaging' category
ring_alert_rules and print_required_alert also appear under 'Notifications & Messaging' and are removed from 'Operations'
Config flags like delivery_mode show a dropdown with options ['both','instant','scheduled'] instead of a raw text input
Number fields show their units (km, ₹, %, minutes, items, orders/hr, ×) as visible labels
store_open_hours shows time pickers for open/close and a checkbox for autoToggle
TypeScript compilation passes with no errors (npx tsc --noEmit)
verification: Run `cd /projects/sandbox/revathysupermarket/apps/web && npx tsc --noEmit` and confirm zero errors
Run `cd /projects/sandbox/revathysupermarket/apps/web && npx next lint` and confirm no new errors
